title: Traceability from answer to source span
description: A response must resolve through context snapshot, summary resolution, C-items and source spans.
query: Which two properties make the demonstrator auditable according to the evidence chain?

need_proposal.reason: Need the concrete lineage and summary rules.

conclusions.content: Auditable context requires durable lineage and rehydratable source spans.

llm.answer: The demonstrator is auditable because answers are rooted in durable lineage and because every relevant selection can be rehydrated down to concrete source spans. [S1] [S2]

documents.title: Lineage specification
documents.text: A response is auditable only if the system can show the path from the answer to the selected context, from selected context to summaries and C-items, and from those units to the originating source spans.

documents.title: Source span rule
documents.text: Traceability is not narrative. The runtime must persist source spans and lineage edges so that a marker can be followed back to evidence.

documents.title: Summary rule
documents.text: Summaries remain traceable because every summary resolution preserves origin_citem_ids and those C-items retain provenance to sources and spans.

citems.content: Answers must be rooted in durable lineage from answer to context snapshot to summaries or C-items.
Markers must resolve to rehydratable source spans rather than narrative claims.
Summary resolutions preserve origin_citem_ids for traceability.

summaries.content: Auditability depends on lineage plus rehydratable evidence.
